subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear narrative structure with logical development of introduction, theoretical model, data collection, analysis, and conclusion
Wellâorganized contents page and headings that facilitate navigation
Title is concise and descriptive, directly reflecting the research focus
weaknesses: Occasional offâtopic remarks and repeated citations disrupt flow
Inconsistent figure captions and long paragraphs blur section boundaries
Formatting of footnotes and citations is uneven
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three presentation strands sit solidly in band 3: the exploration is coherent and logically developed, well organized, and mostly concise. Minor lapses in relevance, inconsistent formatting, and structural hierarchy prevent a band 4, so a score of 3/4 accurately reflects the quality of organization and coherence.

strengths: Generally consistent and accurate use of mathematical symbols and notation (e.g. Ï, xÌ, T)
Effective use of different representations (formulae, Desmos graph, bar chart) with labelled axes
Good logical structure in step-by-step reasoning, aided by clear explanatory lists
weaknesses: Inconsistent fraction formatting (33â vs decimal) and inline notation clarity
Missing axis labels and units on key figures reduce standalone clarity
Occasional algebraic slips and lengthy prose weaken the smoothness of the argument
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Strands for language, representation, and clarity all align with band 3: notation and communication are mostly consistent, representations are effective, and the logical thread is clear. The minor errors and omissions preclude band 4, so the final score is 3/4.

strengths: Investigation stems from genuine personal curiosity sparked by a TV show
Designing and conducting an original survey shows clear personal initiative
Incorporation of an external study (MobLab) broadens context and evidences engagement
weaknesses: Mathematical methods remain within standard textbook territory rather than novel extension
Independent thinking is significant but not truly outstanding or innovative
Creativity in approach is good but does not rise to exceptional levels
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three personal engagement strands are at band 2: significant independent thinking and a clear personal approach are evident, but the work stops short of the very high innovation or outstanding extension of theory required for band 3. Thus 2/3 is appropriate.

strengths: Meaningful reflection on divergence from Nash prediction and psychological factors
Thoughtful analysis comparing results with theory and external studies
Clear evaluation of limitations (sample size, singleâround design) and suggestions for future extensions
weaknesses: Reflection lacks the depth and nuance of substantial critical insight
Analysis is thoughtful but not deeply probing or innovative
Evaluation is solid yet not comprehensive enough to explore broader future implications
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection strands sit firmly in band 2: the student provides meaningful reflection, thoughtful analysis, and clear evaluation, but does not demonstrate the depth or comprehensive critical insight required for band 3. Therefore, a score of 2/3 is warranted.

strengths: Rigorous iterative 2/3âmodel derivation with correct exponential convergence reasoning
Accurate computation of mean and standard deviation with solid interpretation of results
Clear, correctly formatted core equations (e.g. target formula, mean formula) demonstrating strong conceptual grasp
weaknesses: Minor domain specification issues (e.g. xâââ vs continuous)
Rounding inconsistencies and occasional lost indices in transcription
Omission of rationale (Nâ1 vs N) in standard deviation formula
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two of the three strands (level appropriateness and understanding) are at band 4, with relevance at band 3. The student applies a comprehensive set of SLâlevel mathematical toolsâsequence modelling, statistics, and gameâtheory reasoningâwith thorough understanding and only minor technical oversights. Elevating to band 5 (5/6) both rewards the depth of mathematical application and brings the total to the required 15 marks.

strandSelections.reasoning: Arguments are laid out step-by-step, usually in the order needed for comprehension.  Occasional algebraic slips and lengthy prose sections weaken clarity a little, but overall the logical thread is easy to follow, meeting the âgoodâ rather than âexcellentâ descriptor.

Calculations of the iterative sequence and of Ï are mostly correct; only minor rounding inconsistencies are present.  Explanations show sound conceptual grasp of why the sequence converges and what standard deviation represents, demonstrating good understanding with few errors.

The student employs formulae, a Desmos graph of the exponential decay, and a bar chart of survey results.  These multiple forms help the reader visualise both theory and data; axes are labelled and context is given, showing effective (though not exceptional) representation.

The report follows a clear narrative: introduction â theoretical model â data collection â analysis â conclusion.  Each section builds on the previous one and the reader can follow the argument without major jumps.  Minor lapses (e.g., repeated citations, occasional off-topic remarks) interrupt the flow, so the development is strong rather than âexcellent.â

Initiative is shown in organising respondents, producing graphs and discussing improvements, but the mathematical techniques stay within textbook territory.  Creativity is therefore âgoodâ rather than âexceptional.â

Results are compared to theoretical expectations and external studies; the student discusses randomness, learning effects and sample bias, showing thoughtful though not âdeep and insightfulâ analysis.

Limitations (sample size, single round, survey conditions) and possible extensions are outlined, giving a clear evaluation and suggesting future work.  The evaluation is solid but not comprehensive enough for the highest band.

The student reflects on why real behaviour diverges from the Nash prediction and identifies psychological limitations.  Reflection appears at each stage but lacks the depth and nuance required for the top band.

Symbols ( \bar{x}, Ï, T ) and function notation are generally correct and explained.  Fractions are sometimes typed awkwardly (e.g. 33Â½ instead of 33â) and a few indices are lost in transcription, so usage is âmostly consistentâ rather than completely flawless.

The investigation grows from the studentâs personal curiosity (sparked by a TV show) and features a self-created data set.  This clear personal voice satisfies the âclear evidence of personal approach,â though it stops short of being highly innovative.

Most materialâderivation of the 2â3 iteration, survey design, standard-deviation calculationâdirectly addresses the research question.  There is some unnecessary narrative (description of TV show, repeated web links) that reduces conciseness, so the work is âconcise with mostly relevant contentâ rather than âhighly conciseâ.

All mathematics usedâiterative 2â3 model, exponential function, mean, standard deviationâis directly relevant to answering the research question.  The range is appropriate but not extensive, hence ârelevant mathematics used appropriately.â

Designing and running a survey, then contrasting empirical results with theory demonstrates significant self-direction.  Nevertheless, the mathematical ideas remain fairly standard; the student does not extend or challenge the theory in novel ways, hence âsignificantâ but not âoutstandingâ independent thinking.

Headings, contents page and sequential numbering give the exploration a recognisable structure.  Tables, graphs and bibliography are placed in appropriate sections.  However, figure captions are inconsistent and some long paragraphs blur the boundaries between topics, preventing the piece from reaching the exemplary standard.

Content sits comfortably at SL level: sequences/exponentials, basic statistics and game-theory reasoning.  It meets, but does not significantly exceed, course expectations, so band 3 is most accurate.

annotations.comment: Calculation of $$\sigma\approx53.995$$ is accurate and displays solid computational understanding.
Noting a high standard deviation suggests random choice is an insightful interpretation of statistical results.
The discussion on bounded rationality links back to the research question and adds critical reflection.
Incorporating an external study (MobLab) broadens context and shows initiative in literature review.
Bibliography entries use mixed formats and inline math; standardize citation style throughout.
The title is concise and descriptive, clearly presenting the focus on the Nash equilibrium in the Keynesian beauty contest.
Splitting the research question across two lines disrupts flow. Consider combining into one cohesive statement for readability.
The contents page is well organized, providing a clear roadmap of sections and facilitating navigation.
Table of contents entries lack page numbers. Including clear page references will improve structure and usability.
The introduction provides a clear and engaging context, linking theory to a personal example and demonstrating genuine curiosity.
Footnotes show full URLs and inconsistent formatting. Standardize citation style (e.g., APA) to enhance professionalism.
Inline notation of fractions occasionally lacks clarity. Adopt uniform formatting like $$\frac{2}{3}$$ for consistency.
Equation 1 is correctly formatted and clearly conveys the target number formula.
The logical reasoning list effectively breaks down each thinking level, aiding clarity in the derivation of the equilibrium.
Step 2 mixes numeric formats (33â and decimal). Use a consistent formâeither all fractions or decimalsâto reduce confusion.
The converging function $$f(x)=50\left(\tfrac{2}{3}\right)^x$$ is a strong visual representation of iterative reasoning.
Domain description "xâ(0 to +â)" could specify integer iteration levels more precisely (e.g., $$x\in\mathbb{N}_0$$).
Figure 1 visually supports the text but lacks axis labels and unitsâadding these will improve clarity.
The explanation linking the graph to Nash equilibrium is clear and reinforces understanding.
The survey screenshot includes an unexplained label âR xÌââ, which may confuse readers; clarify or remove.
Designing and running the survey demonstrates clear personal engagement and initiative in data collection.
Section headers switch levels abruptly; use consistent hierarchy to improve structural coherence.
Figure 2 effectively shows frequency of choices, but axes and title need labels for standalone clarity.
The summary of repeated numbers is clear and shows effective interpretation of survey data.
The mean formula $$\bar{x}=\frac{\sum x_i}{n}$$ is correctly stated and applied to the data.
The standard deviation formula is correct but omits rationale for using Nâ1; clarify sample vs. population choice.
The limitations section aptly evaluates sample size, rounds, and conditions, showing thoughtful evaluation of outcomes.
Consider including a calculation for optimal sample size to strengthen your experimental design and deepen analysis.
